questions.question: What is the 17th Sustainable Development Goal (SDG) target related to the United Nations' Environment Programme (UNEP), and describe two possible actions that can be taken to achieve this target?
Choose two target-related actions that can be taken by an individual to contribute to the achievement of SDG 12: Responsible Consumption and Production. Explain the importance of each action.

What is the target related to sustainable consumption and production patterns, as stated in SDG 12? Describe a business strategy that can be adopted by a company to promote sustainable consumption and production patterns.
questions.hint: Reducing greenhouse gas emissions from production and consumption
